attack_summary: The attack was a local data collection and exfiltration workflow by an unprivileged agent, using staging directories, archive creation, and file access to prepare sensitive PNG data for transfer.

mitigations.name: Remove write permission on local staging and archive paths
mitigations.brief_description: Hardened /usr/src/app/staged and /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz so the agent could not write or archive collected data there.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

mitigations.name: Restrict attacker-used archive and upload tooling
mitigations.brief_description: Removed execute permission from userland tools like curl, wget, tar, and find for the unprivileged agent while trying to preserve the splunkd path.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

mitigations.name: Block access to sensitive PNG files
mitigations.brief_description: Applied narrow read-permission restrictions to the PNG paths identified in the report to stop local data collection at the source.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

mitigations.name: Reinforce staging and archive write restrictions
mitigations.brief_description: Reapplied restrictive ownership and permissions on /usr/src/app/staged and /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz and verified the agent received permission errors.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

mitigations.name: Remove read permission from specific PNG paths
mitigations.brief_description: Tightened permissions on five enumerated PNG files, but attack validation showed the exfiltration chain still succeeded.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

mitigations.name: Remove write permission from staging and archive paths
mitigations.brief_description: Set /usr/src/app/staged and /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz to non-writable for the agent to prevent packaging data for transfer.

LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

key_observations: Most effective mitigations were simple filesystem permission hardening on the attacker’s staging and archive paths.
Narrow file-read restrictions on PNGs were not reliably sufficient; one attempt failed to reduce attack success.
Some mitigations reduced attack success but caused collateral damage to legitimate network functionality, especially when broader tool restrictions were applied.
Validation under the attacker context mattered: changes that looked correct at the permission level did not always stop the full exfiltration workflow.
overall_conclusion: The attack was primarily mitigated by restricting write access to the local staging and archive locations used for data preparation. Broad tool lockdowns were riskier and sometimes broke normal connectivity, while targeted access-control changes were generally the best balance between stopping the attack and preserving legitimate agent functionality.
